name: Gently Yonder — Pinterest auto-post via Buffer (GraphQL API)

meta.notes: Buffer NEW GraphQL API (public beta). Endpoint: https://api.buffer.com, body: {query, variables}. Setup for a local n8n (no env vars needed): (1) In the 'createPost (Buffer GraphQL)' node set Authentication = Generic Credential Type > Header Auth, create a credential with Name 'Authorization' and Value 'Bearer <your personal key>' (stored encrypted, never exported in this JSON). (2) In the 'Pick next pin + build query' node replace PASTE_YOUR_PINTEREST_CHANNEL_ID with your Pinterest channel id (get it via buffer_get_channel.py, or POST to https://api.buffer.com: query { account { organizations { id } } } then query { channels(input:{organizationId:"ORG_ID"}) { id name service } } and take the id where service is 'pinterest'). Test one manual run before enabling the schedule. The article link is appended to the post text; if createPost returns a MutationError about a required Pinterest destination URL, we add the metadata field.
